---
name: Weekly Product Review
about: Lightweight recurring product review for Fretline
title: "Weekly Product Review"
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

## Purpose
Lightweight recurring review to keep product quality under control as AI-generated work accumulates.

## Review Window
- Date:
- Build / commit reviewed:
- Device(s) used:

## End-to-End Pass
- [ ] Open the app from a clean start
- [ ] Go through the main practice flow end to end
- [ ] Check the current active phase surfaces, not just the latest changed screen
- [ ] Verify the app still feels coherent as a product, not just technically working

## Friction Points
- [ ] Note any point where the flow feels slow, confusing, awkward, or too admin-like

Notes:

## Regressions
- [ ] Log any functional regression
- [ ] Log any visual regression
- [ ] Link existing bug issues when applicable instead of duplicating

Notes:

## UX Debt
- [ ] Capture any new concrete UX debt discovered during review
- [ ] Only create a new issue if the problem is specific and scoped

Notes:

## Phase Check
- [ ] Verify the current active phase still reflects the highest-value work
- [ ] Check whether any open issue should be re-scoped, split, or deprioritized

Notes:

## Ready For Codex
- [ ] Identify what should move into `Ready for Codex` next
- [ ] Keep the queue disciplined: only small, clear, implementation-ready issues

Candidates:

## Outcome
- [ ] Review completed
- [ ] Follow-up issues created or updated if needed
- [ ] Board updated if priorities changed
